> ⚠️ **Do not report security vulnerabilities here.** If you have found a way to
> exfiltrate data, escape the sandbox, bypass sanitization, or otherwise defeat a
> documented protection, follow the private process in
> [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead of opening a public issue.
